script.title: CQP - Watcher - Generate N Periods and Summary Claims
script.description: CQP - Watcher - Generate N Periods and Summary Claims
script.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  CQP - Watcher - Generate N Periods and Summary Claims
 *  By Adriana Centellas
 */

//Get Data from Form
$inceptionDate = $data["CQP_INCEPTION_DATE"] ?? null;
$nPeriods = $data["CQP_NUMBER_OF_PERIODS"] ?? null;

// Generate default #periods for SUMMARY CLAIMS and PERIODS TABLE
$summaryClaims = generateSummaryClaims($nPeriods, $inceptionDate);

//Return Array Created
return $summaryClaims;

/*
* Generates an array of claims objects with period labels growing in time (22-23, 23-24, 24-25, ...)
* while the period number counts down (N, N-1, ..., 1). 
* Example output:
*   Period 3 - 22-23
*   Period 2 - 23-24
*   Period 1 - 24-25
*
* @param (int) $numPeriods        // Total number of periods to generate
* @param (string) $inceptionISO   // Inception date in ISO format (e.g. "2024-05-01")
* @return (array) $claimsArray    // Array of generated claims with period info
*
* by Adriana Centellas
*/
function generateSummaryClaims($numPeriods, $inceptionISO) {
    // Extract year from inception date (first 4 digits)
    $inceptionYear = (int) substr($inceptionISO, 0, 4);

    $claimsArray = [];

    // Loop to generate claims data
    for ($i = 0; $i < $numPeriods; $i++) {
        // Years: oldest first, newest last
        $toYearFull   = $inceptionYear - ($numPeriods - 1) + $i;
        $prevYearFull = $toYearFull - 1;

        $yyPrev = substr((string)$prevYearFull, 2);
        $yyTo   = substr((string)$toYearFull, 2);
        $periodYears = "{$yyPrev}-{$yyTo}";

        // Period number DESC: N, N-1, ..., 1
        $periodNumber = $numPeriods - $i;

        // Create associative array for each claim
        $claim = [
            "period" => $periodNumber,
            "form_html_viewer" => null,
            "CQP_FREQUENCY_STORAGE" => 0,
            "CQP_TOTAL_CLAIMS_STORAGE" => 0,
            "CQP_FREQUENCY_TRANSIT" => 0,
            "CQP_TOTAL_CLAIMS_TRANSIT" => 0,
            "CQP_PERIOD_YEARS" => $periodYears,
            "CQP_TOTAL_CLAIMS_COMBINED" => 0
        ];

        $claimsArray[] = $claim;
    }

    return $claimsArray;
}

script.description: CQP - Watcher - Generate N Periods TABLE
script.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  CQP - Watcher - Generate N Periods and Summary Claims
 *  By Adriana Centellas
 */

//Get Data from Form
$inceptionDate = $data["CQP_INCEPTION_DATE"] ?? null;
$nPeriods = $data["CQP_NUMBER_OF_PERIODS"] ?? null;

// Generate default #periods for SUMMARY CLAIMS and PERIODS TABLE
$rows = generatePeriodsRows($nPeriods, $inceptionDate);

//Return Array Created
return $rows;

/*
* Parse an ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD' into a DateTimeImmutable in UTC
*
* @param (string) $iso //1-10
* @return (DateTimeImmutable) $dateUTC
*
* by Adriana Centellas
*/
function parseISODateUTC($iso)
{
    // Create DateTimeImmutable in UTC timezone
    return new DateTimeImmutable($iso . ' 00:00:00', new DateTimeZone('UTC'));
}

/*
* Add a number of years to a given DateTimeImmutable in UTC
*
* @param (DateTimeImmutable) $date //1-10
* @param (int) $years
* @return (DateTimeImmutable) $newDate
*
* by Adriana Centellas
*/
function addYearsUTC(DateTimeImmutable $date, $years)
{
    // Use modify with a relative string to add years
    return $date->modify((int)$years . ' year');
}

/*
* Add a number of days to a given DateTimeImmutable
*
* @param (DateTimeImmutable) $date //1-10
* @param (int) $days
* @return (DateTimeImmutable) $newDate
*
* by Adriana Centellas
*/
function addDaysUTC(DateTimeImmutable $date, $days)
{
    // Use modify with a relative string to add days
    return $date->modify((int)$days . ' day');
}

/*
* Format a DateTimeInterface into 'YYYY-MM-DD' string
*
* @param (DateTimeInterface) $date //1-10
* @return (string) $isoString
*
* by Adriana Centellas
*/
function toISODate(DateTimeInterface $date)
{
    // Format to ISO date string
    return $date->format('Y-m-d');
}

/*
* Safely convert a value to a float number (null/empty/non-numeric -> 0)
*
* @param (mixed) $value //1-10
* @return (float) $number
*
* by Adriana Centellas
*/
function toNumber($value)
{
    // Treat null, empty string and non-numeric as zero
    if ($value === null || $value === '' || !is_numeric($value)) {
        return 0.0;
    }

    // Convert to float
    return (float)$value;
}

/*
* Generate period rows based on number of periods and inception date
*
* Builds an array of periods with FROM/TO dates chained backwards,
* initializes financial fields to zero, and finally reverses the array
* so that the latest period is 1.
*
* @param (int) $numPeriods //1-10
* @param (string) $inceptionISO
* @return (array) $reversed
*
* by Adriana Centellas
*/
function generatePeriodsRows($numPeriods, $inceptionISO)
{
    // Ensure number of periods is at least 0
    $numPeriods = (int)$numPeriods;
    if ($numPeriods <= 0) {
        return [];
    }

    // ---------------- Base array ----------------
    $arr = [];

    // Build base structure for each period
    for ($idx = 0; $idx < $numPeriods; $idx++) {
        $arr[$idx] = [
            'period'                  => $idx + 1,
            'form_html_viewer'        => null,
            'CQP_FROM'                => null,
            'CQP_TO'                  => null,

            // Inputs (per row)
            'CQP_GWP_USD'             => 0,
            'CQP_BROKERAGE_COMISSION' => 0, // expected as decimal (0.15 for 15%)
            'CQP_TAX'                 => 0, // expected as decimal
            'CQP_UNDERWRITING_EXPENSES' => 0, // expected as decimal

            // Derived
            'CQP_CLAIM_USD'           => 0,
            'CQP_NWP'                 => 0,
            'CQP_LOSS_RADIO'          => 0,
            'CQP_COMBINED_RADIO'      => 0,
        ];
    }

    // ------------- Period 1 based on inception -------------
    // toDate = inception date
    $toDate = parseISODateUTC($inceptionISO);
    // fromDate = (toDate - 1 year) + 1 day
    $fromDate = addDaysUTC(addYearsUTC($toDate, -1), 1);

    $arr[0]['CQP_TO']   = toISODate($toDate);
    $arr[0]['CQP_FROM'] = toISODate($fromDate);

    // ------------- Chain the rest -------------
    for ($i = 1; $i < $numPeriods; $i++) {
        // toDate = previous FROM date
        $prevFromISO = $arr[$i - 1]['CQP_FROM'];
        $toDate      = parseISODateUTC($prevFromISO);

        // fromDate = (toDate - 1 year) + 1 day
        $fromDate = addDaysUTC(addYearsUTC($toDate, -1), 1);

        $arr[$i]['CQP_TO']   = toISODate($toDate);
        $arr[$i]['CQP_FROM'] = toISODate($fromDate);
    }

    // ------------- Reverse order and renumber periods -------------
    $reversed = array_reverse($arr);
    $total    = count($reversed);

    // Renumber period so latest is 1
    foreach ($reversed as $index => &$item) {
        // Latest period (last originally) becomes period 1
        $item['period'] = $total - $index;
    }
    unset($item); // Clear reference

    return $reversed;
}
